data.name: Klukai

weaponImprint.name: Skylla
weaponImprint.trait: If a phase weakness is exploited, ignores 10% of target's defense. If it was a Corrosion phase weakness, ignores another 10% defense.
weaponImprint.effect: AoE damage dealt is increased by 15%/17%/19%/21%/23%/25%. Each time Corrosion damage is dealt, damage is increased by 2%/2.4%/2.8%/3.2%/3.6%/4%, up to a maximum of 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to URNC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has Corrosion debuffs, increase damage by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: Elegant and composed; a Doll brimming with confidence. She aspires to make every member of H.I.D.E. 404 into an elite. Only those who are familiar with her know the tenderness that lies behind her cold, strong-willed demeanor.

skills.name: Swift Strike
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Elite's Pride
skills.description:
Immune to all negative [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] tile effects. When dealing damage with active attacks, applies 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to the target for 2 turns, and gains 1 stack of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842] after skill usage.

Each time Klukai performs an active attack or other allied units deal Corrosion damage, Klukai gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For every 3 points of Confectance Index gained, reduces the cooldown of her Ultimate skill by 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Immune to all negative [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] tile effects.

At the start of the battle, gains 3 stacks of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842]. When dealing damage with active attacks, applies 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to the target for 2 turns.

Each time Klukai performs an active attack or other allied units deal Corrosion damage, Klukai gains 1 stack of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842] after skill usage and gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

For every 3 points of Confectance Index gained, applies an additional 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to enemy units with [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060], and reduces the cooldown of her Ultimate skill by 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
At the start of the battle, gains 3 stacks of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842]. When other allied units deal Corrosion damage, Klukai can gain 1 stack of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842]. Increases the stack limit of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842] by 4 stacks.

For every 3 points of Confectance Index gained, applies an additional 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to enemy units with [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060], and reduces the cooldown of Klukai's Ultimate skill by 1 turn. [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] gains a new effect: When Klukai performs an active attack or other allied units deal Corrosion damage, applies an additional 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to targets with [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060]. Defense is reduced by 1%, and the stack limit is increased by 5 stacks.

skills.name: Pinpoint Detonation
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 80% of attack. Performs an additional attack, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 60% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 3 tiles, pulling all affected enemy targets 1 tile towards the center.

If any enemy targets are killed, reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Devastating Drift by 1 turn and gains 2 points of Confectance Index. If no enemy targets are killed, applies 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to the target for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack. Performs an additional attack, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 60% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 3 tiles. For each stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] the target has, the damage multiplier is increased by 5%, and all affected enemy targets are pulled 1 tile towards the center. If a phase weakness is exploited, the attack ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction.

If any enemy targets are killed, reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Devastating Drift by 1 turn and gains 2 points of Confectance Index. If no enemy targets are killed, applies 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases damage dealt by the first attack to 100% of attack. For each stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] on the target, the damage multiplier of the additional attack is increased by 5%. If a phase weakness is exploited, the attack ignores 15% of the target's Cover damage reduction.

skills.name: Overpowering Corrosion
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, and applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns. Increases damage by 15% to targets already affected by [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, and applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns. If the target survives, triggers the on-death effect of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]. Increases damage dealt by 30% to targets already affected by [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 tile within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 110% of attack to all enemy targets within 5 tiles, and applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns. If the target survives, triggers the on-death effect of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]. If the target is inflicted with a Corrosion debuff, applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns before the attack. Increases damage by 30% to targets already affected by [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases damage dealt to targets that are already inflicted with [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] by 30%. If the target is not killed from this damage, it can also trigger the on-death effect of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]. [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] has a new effect: At the end of the action of the unit which possessed this effect, the inflictor applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] to enemy units within 3 tiles that do not possess [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Effective range increases by 2 tiles, damage increases to 110% of attack. [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] spread radius increases by 1 tile, and the damage it deals increases to 80% of attack.

If the target is inflicted with a Corrosion debuff, applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns before the attack.

[effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] gains an additional effect: When receiving an active attack from Klukai, damage taken is increased by 30%.

skills.name: Devastating Drift
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile and dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide. Gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If 2 or more targets are killed, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, applying [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] and [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns, and dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide. Gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. For each enemy hit, increases damage dealt by an additional 10%, up to a maximum of 50%. If a Boss is hit, this increase will be immediately raised to the maximum value of 50%.

If 2 or more targets or a Boss is hit, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, applying [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] and [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns, dealing AoE Corrosion damage that ignores Cover damage reduction equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 7 tiles wide. Applies [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] for 2 turns, and gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. For each enemy hit, increases damage dealt by an additional 10%, up to a maximum of 50%. If a Boss is hit, this increase will be immediately raised to the maximum value of 50%.

If 2 or more targets or a Boss is hit, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.

After the skill is used, triggers all enemies' effects of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] and the on-death effects of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: For each enemy hit, increases damage dealt by an additional 10%, up to a maximum of 50%. If a Boss is hit, this increase will be immediately raised to the maximum value of 50%. If 2 or more targets or a Boss is hit, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time. Before attacking, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] and [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Ignores Cover damage reduction. Increases width by 2 tiles and applies [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] for 2 turns.

After the attack, triggers all enemies' effects of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] and the on-death effects of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, if the user's Confectance Index is full, the next instance of AoE damage inflicted by an active attack is increased by 10%.

At the start of battle, Klukai summons [effect:36b8a0c8-f35f-4c2b-8421-3265c5bca1ab] which follows her.

When [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] is triggered, each stack of [effect:740af6e6-5c70-40ce-9ec3-cb1b54d6b842] increase the damage multiplier of each stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] is increased by 1%.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key - Pride of the Elite

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, if there's only one enemy target, applies 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] to them for 2 turns. Additionally, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
If the Ultimate skill Devastating Drift only hits 1 target, increases the damage dealt by 30%.
[effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] gains a new effect, it increases damage to the target in Stability Break by 15%.
For every Support Attack performed by other allied units, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
Reduces the width of the Ultimate skill Devastating Drift's effective area to 3 tiles. For each tile reduced, increases damage dealt by 10%.

After the unit(s) afflicted with [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] take damage from its effect and survive, they are inflicted with 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect: Increases damage dealt to targets that are already inflicted with [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] by 30%. If the target is not killed from this damage, it can also trigger the on-death effect of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]. [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] has a new effect: At the end of the action of the unit which possessed this effect, the inflictor applies [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] to enemy units within 3 tiles that do not possess [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
Ignores Cover damage reduction. Increases width by 2 tiles and applies [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] for 2 turns.

After the attack, triggers all enemies' effects of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] and the on-death effects of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].

doll.name: Klukai
doll.effects: Elegant and composed; a Doll brimming with confidence. She aspires to make every member of H.I.D.E. 404 into an elite. Only those who are familiar with her know the tenderness that lies behind her cold, strong-willed demeanor.

skillsLevel3.name: Devastating Drift
skillsLevel3.description: Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile and dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide. Gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If 2 or more targets are killed, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, applying [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] and [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns, and dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide. Gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. For each enemy hit, increases damage dealt by an additional 10%, up to a maximum of 50%. If a Boss is hit, this increase will be immediately raised to the maximum value of 50%.

If 2 or more targets or a Boss is hit, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, applying [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] and [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e] for 2 turns, dealing AoE Corrosion damage that ignores Cover damage reduction equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 7 tiles wide. Applies [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] for 2 turns, and gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. For each enemy hit, increases damage dealt by an additional 10%, up to a maximum of 50%. If a Boss is hit, this increase will be immediately raised to the maximum value of 50%.

If 2 or more targets or a Boss is hit, this skill can be used again, up to a maximum of 1 additional time.

After the skill is used, triggers all enemies' effects of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] and the on-death effects of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e].

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Corrosion debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Increase Corrosion damage dealt by 5%. Maximum of 8 stacks. This is considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"94c51ad3-5655-4432-a585-7983868e2031","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

Increase Corrosion damage dealt by 5%. Maximum of 12 stacks. This is considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

At the end of the action, the applier deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 12% of attack. For each additional stack, the damage multiplier is increased by 12%. Upon being hit by active attacks from Klukai or Corrosion damage from other enemies, gain 1 additional stack and refresh the debuff duration, maximum of 10 stacks. Removed after the applier is killed. Considered a Corrosion debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"0762e80f-45b7-4e66-b10f-0e517ec75bd6","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

Reduce defense by 1%. At the end of the action, the applier deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 12% of attack. For each additional stack, the damage multiplier is increased by 12%. Upon being hit by active attacks from Klukai or Corrosion damage from other enemies, gain 2 additional stacks and refresh the debuff duration, maximum of 15 stacks. Removed after the applier is killed. Considered a Corrosion debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

After this unit makes an active attack, deals cover-ignoring AoE Corrosion damage to 3 nearest enemy targets equal to 100% of attack as well as applying 1 instance of [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]. Damage multiplier is increased by 10% each time [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] or [effect:610dc13b-05b5-4d45-96ea-e295b85c1a6e]'s on-death effect is triggered.

{"mainDetails":"

At the end of the action, gains 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] for 2 turns. Upon death, the applier inflicts Toxic Infiltration on the debuff holder and all enemy units within 3 tiles for 2 turns, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 60% of attack. This effect is removed after the applier is killed. Considered a Corrosion debuff.

","upgrades":[{"id":"7d1b30d0-bd2f-4996-8ce1-78e270a94883","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the action, gains 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] for 2 turns. Additionally, the applier inflicts Toxic Infiltration for 2 turns to all enemies within 3 tiles who do not have Toxic Infiltration. Upon death, the applier inflicts Toxic Infiltration for 2 turns to all allies within 3 tiles centered on the unit with this effect, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 60% of attack. This effect is removed after the applier is killed. Considered a Corrosion debuff.

","order":0},{"id":"1fd26cd6-2c64-48f2-b9d6-7d6c014ac2b7","upgradeName":"V5","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the action, gains 1 stack of [effect:d2cc96c5-5bff-4a15-aaaf-98597cac4060] for 2 turns. Additionally, the applier inflicts Toxic Infiltration for 2 turns to all enemies within 4 tiles who do not have Toxic Infiltration. Upon death, the applier inflicts Toxic Infiltration for 2 turns to all allies within 4 tiles centered on the unit with this effect, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 80% of attack.

When attacked by Klukai's active attacks, increases damage taken by 30%. This effect is removed after the applier is killed. Considered a Corrosion debuff.

","order":1}]}
